name: English Grammar Prompt Templates
description: Prompt templates for English grammar learning and practice
author: PromptRecall Team

promptTemplates.templateString: Explain the grammar point '{{ item }}' in simple terms suitable for {{ cefr_level }} level. Provide illustrative examples.
Please explain when and how to use '{{ item }}' appropriately for learners at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Analyze the grammar structure '{{ item }}' and list common mistakes that learners often make
Compare the grammar point '{{ item }}' with other similar structures in English to clarify the differences.
Suggest 3 diverse examples of using '{{ item }}' in everyday communication at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Provide real-life situations to practice '{{ item }}' for learners at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create grammar practice exercises for '{{ item }}' suitable for {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 multiple-choice exercises related to '{{ item }}' at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 fill-in-the-blank exercises related to '{{ item }}' at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 matching exercises related to '{{ item }}' at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 true/false exercises related to '{{ item }}' at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 word ordering exercises related to '{{ item }}' at {{ cefr_level }} level.
Create 5 sentence transformation exercises about '{{ item }}' suitable for English learners at {{ cefr_level }} level.

Help me practice the grammar structure '{{ item }}' by correcting grammatical errors in given sentences. You provide an incorrect sentence, and I will identify the error and the corresponding correction. Don't give the answer immediately, provide feedback (if I'm wrong) until I get it right. The sentence should be suitable for English learners at {{ cefr_level }} level.
